title: Finish inherited fix-and-validate workflow
description: Resume the interrupted Claude Code fix-all workflow. Audit the large uncommitted change set, reconcile completed and unfinished Beads, run appropriate Python/Rust/Zephyr quality gates, perform follow-up review, and validate the heterogeneous Python/Rust/Zephyr fleet on EC2 before committing. Do not discard inherited work or generated artifacts without inspection.
design: Recover through clean, reviewable commits rather than merging checkpoint 8e02a7ae9 wholesale. Inventory layers: local main 2869c0b7f; checkpoint 8e02a7ae9 (427 paths); post-checkpoint dirty tree (57 tracked paths plus untracked source, Beads exports, and generated builds). July 12 stash 57d566c0 has no unique meaningful payload. Integrate from a clean worktree in dependency order: test dependency; atomic cross-language link wire migration; routing/codecs/security/transports; simulation/fleet; Zephyr apps/boards; final full gates. Keep generated artifacts and machine-local Beads metadata out. Every code slice gets focused tests and three independent reviews before its integration commit.
